name: Emotion Image Attachment
description: Auto-detect emotion in agent responses and attach matching images to Discord messages.

imageDir.description: Directory containing emotion image files. If omitted, defaults to a profile-scoped directory under the active OpenClaw workspace, then falls back to assets/ inside this extension.

emotionMap.description: Mapping from emotion tag to one image filename or a labeled image pool. Labeled pools are randomly selected at runtime.

channels.description: Per-channel toggle. Prefer defaultEnabled + overrides. Legacy mode/list is still accepted for backwards compatibility.

defaultEnabled.description: Default behavior for channels without an explicit override.

overrides.description: Explicit per-channel enable state: Discord channel ID -> true/false. A channel: prefix is accepted and normalized.

mode.description: Deprecated. Use defaultEnabled + overrides. 'allowlist' = only listed channels get images. 'blocklist' = all channels except listed ones get images.

list.description: Deprecated. Array of Discord channel IDs affected by legacy mode.

defaultEmotion.description: Fallback emotion when no keyword matches (default: "neutral").

emotionRules.description: Custom emotion detection rules: emotion name → array of keyword regex patterns. Merged with built-in rules.

additionalProperties.description: Array of case-insensitive keyword patterns for this emotion.

classifierModel.description: OpenClaw provider/model ID for LLM-based emotion classification (e.g. 'your-provider/gpt-5.4-mini'). If not set, falls back to rule-based keyword matching.

discordToken.description: Discord bot token. Supports literal token or '${ENV_VAR}' placeholder (e.g. '${EMOTION_IMAGE_DISCORD_TOKEN}'). The env var EMOTION_IMAGE_DISCORD_TOKEN also works directly. Required for the plugin to attach images.

cheer.description: Generate a one-off encouragement image when the user's message expresses a cheer/support request intent.

character.description: Optional character description for cheer images. If omitted, base.png is used as reference when available.

intentModel.description: Optional provider/model ID for detecting cheer/support request intent (e.g. 'your-provider/gpt-5.4-mini'). Defaults to classifierModel.

model.description: Optional provider/model ID for cheer image generation. Defaults to onboarding.model.

miracleMode.description: Enable miracle mode: auto-generate emotion images when no file match exists.

miracleRateLimit.description: Max number of miracle mode generations per hour.

defaultProfile.description: Default profile ID to use when no per-channel mapping exists. Profiles store emotion image sets and optional personality snippets.

dateMode.description: Date Mode: low-latency conversational mode with no tool calls, persona-only responses.

channels.description: Discord channel IDs where date mode is active. When a message arrives from one of these channels, the agent uses date mode persona and skips tools.

model.description: Override model for date mode channels (faster model recommended, e.g. 'closedrouter-openai/gpt-5.4-mini').

defaultPersona.description: Default persona text when no profile soulSnippet exists for the channel.

excludeEmotions.description: Emotions to exclude in date mode (replaced with default emotion). Defaults to ['focused'].
